title: Resolve, to Authorize the State Tax Assessor to Convey the Interest of the State in Certain Real Estate in the Unorganized Territory
last_house_action: 3/12/2026 - FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

actions.description: Received by the Clerk of the House on December 15, 2025. The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Resolve was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-817) . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Report READ and ACCEPTED, in concurrence. Bill READ ONCE. Committee Amendment "A" (H-817) READ and ADOPTED. ASSIGNED FOR SECOND READING NEXT LEGISLATIVE DAY.

COMMITTEE ON BILLS IN THE SECOND READING REPORTS NO FURTHER VERBAL AMENDMENTS NECESSARY. REPORT ACCEPTED. READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED BY Committee Amendment "A" (H-817) , in concurrence. Ordered sent down forthwith.
FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
